author: anon-a7c6025f
content: All 9 design documents iterated to production quality. Final counts: 121 requirements, 138 acceptance criteria, 0 open questions, 0 TODO/TBD markers. All 13 previously-open questions resolved. Key additions: operator overloading, Display formatting, method API, in-place ops, derive(Module) macro, functional API, SafeTensors interop, PyTorch checkpoint import, GradScaler, IterableDataset, pin_memory, pre-trained weights, feature extraction, model registry, autocast/mixed precision, CUDA graphs, ferrotorch-run launcher, elastic training, compile() API, graph breaks, export mode.
